name: Firmware Carver (binwalk)
description: Carve and recursively extract embedded files from a firmware image or blob (filesystems, bootloaders, nested archives) with binwalk. The heavy sibling of bin-triage's embedded-signature preview. Prereq-gated on binwalk; honest blind spot with an install hint when absent.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install binwalk v3 (https://github.com/ReFirmLabs/binwalk) — a single Rust binary; some extractors also want unsquashfs/jefferson/sasquatch on PATH.

safety.notes: Trusted carver over untrusted firmware. binwalk scans signatures and runs extractors (decompress/unpack) — it does not run the firmware. Extractors are numerous; run this sandboxed (no network, writable output dir only) with the timeout.

args.name: outdir
args.desc: output dir for the carved tree

payload.note: BYO tool on PATH (binwalk pulls a whole extractor ecosystem; not bundled). Runs `binwalk -e` with cwd=outdir so the carved tree lands there on v2 or v3. Dispatcher prereq gate = honest degradation. Feeds the *-analyze / covert-scan skills on the revealed tree.
